description: EUDR Supply Chain Mapper (AGENT-EUDR-001) - Graph construction, traceability, risk propagation, gap analysis, DDS export, and SLO monitoring

panels.description: Number of currently active supply chain graphs
panels.title: Active Graphs

panels.description: Total number of nodes across all active supply chain graphs
panels.title: Total Nodes

panels.description: Average compliance readiness score across all active graphs (0-100)
panels.title: Compliance Readiness

panels.description: Rate of supply chain graph creation per minute over the last 5 minutes
panels.title: Graph Creation Rate

panels.description: Total error rate across all operation types per second over the last 5 minutes
panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: Median processing duration across all operations over the last 5 minutes
panels.title: Median Processing Duration

panels.description: Rate of supply chain graph creation over time (metric 1: gl_eudr_scm_graphs_created_total)
panels.title: Graph Creation Rate

panels.description: Rate of nodes added by node type (metric 2: gl_eudr_scm_nodes_added_total). Shows producer, collector, processor, trader, importer, certifier, warehouse, and port node types.
panels.title: Nodes Added by Type

panels.description: Rate of custody transfer edges added to supply chain graphs (metric 3: gl_eudr_scm_edges_added_total)
panels.title: Edge Creation Rate

panels.description: Multi-tier recursive discovery operations rate (metric 4: gl_eudr_scm_tier_discovery_total)
panels.title: Tier Discovery Rate

panels.description: Forward and backward trace operations by direction (metric 5: gl_eudr_scm_trace_operations_total)
panels.title: Trace Operations by Direction

panels.description: Risk propagation runs across supply chain graphs (metric 6: gl_eudr_scm_risk_propagations_total)
panels.title: Risk Propagation Rate

panels.description: Compliance gaps detected by severity level (metric 7: gl_eudr_scm_gaps_detected_total). Labels: gap_type (missing_geolocation, missing_polygon, broken_custody_chain, unverified_actor, missing_tier, mass_balance_discrepancy, missing_certification, stale_data, orphan_node, missing_documentation), severity (critical, high, medium, low).
panels.title: Gaps Detected by Severity

panels.description: Compliance gaps detected by gap type (metric 7: gl_eudr_scm_gaps_detected_total). Shows distribution across gap categories.
panels.title: Gaps Detected by Type

panels.description: Gap resolution rate versus detection rate (metrics 7 and 8: gl_eudr_scm_gaps_detected_total, gl_eudr_scm_gaps_resolved_total). A healthy system should show the resolution rate tracking close to or exceeding the detection rate.
panels.title: Gap Detection vs Resolution

panels.description: DDS (Due Diligence Statement) export operations rate (metric 9: gl_eudr_scm_dds_exports_total)
panels.title: DDS Export Rate

panels.description: Cumulative DDS exports, graphs created, and gaps resolved showing operational volume totals
panels.title: Cumulative Operations

panels.description: Error rate by operation type (metric 12: gl_eudr_scm_errors_total). Shows graph_create, node_add, edge_add, risk_propagate, gap_analyze, dds_export, trace_forward, trace_backward failures.
panels.title: Errors by Operation

panels.description: Processing duration percentiles by operation type (metric 10: gl_eudr_scm_processing_duration_seconds). Buckets: 5ms, 10ms, 25ms, 50ms, 100ms, 250ms, 500ms, 1s, 2.5s, 5s, 10s, 30s.
panels.title: Processing Duration Percentiles

panels.description: Graph query duration percentiles (metric 11: gl_eudr_scm_graph_query_duration_seconds). Buckets: 1ms, 5ms, 10ms, 25ms, 50ms, 100ms, 250ms, 500ms, 1s, 2.5s. SLO target: p99 < 500ms.
panels.title: Graph Query Duration Percentiles

panels.description: Processing duration breakdown by individual operation type showing p95 latency per operation (metric 10: gl_eudr_scm_processing_duration_seconds). Operations: graph_create, node_add, edge_add, tier_discover, trace_forward, trace_backward, risk_propagate, gap_analyze, dds_export, batch_trace, provenance_hash, snapshot_create.
panels.title: Processing Duration by Operation (p95)

panels.description: Heatmap of processing duration distribution showing request density across latency buckets over time (metric 10: gl_eudr_scm_processing_duration_seconds)
panels.title: Processing Duration Heatmap

panels.description: SLO: p99 graph query latency must remain below 500ms. Green indicates compliance, red indicates SLO breach. Based on metric 11: gl_eudr_scm_graph_query_duration_seconds.
panels.title: SLO: Graph Query p99 (< 500ms)

panels.description: SLO: p95 API response latency must remain below 200ms. Based on processing duration metric 10: gl_eudr_scm_processing_duration_seconds. Green indicates compliance, red indicates SLO breach.
panels.title: SLO: API Response p95 (< 200ms)

panels.description: SLO: Gap detection accuracy must remain at or above 95%. Calculated as the ratio of resolved gaps to detected gaps. A value near or above 95% indicates the gap analyzer is producing actionable, accurate detections.
panels.title: SLO: Gap Detection Accuracy (>= 95%)

panels.description: SLO compliance tracking over time. Shows p99 graph query latency with the 500ms SLO threshold line, and p95 processing duration with the 200ms SLO threshold line.
panels.title: SLO Compliance Over Time

panels.description: Error budget burn rate calculated as the ratio of actual error rate to the tolerated error budget (5% budget = 0.05). A burn rate above 1.0 means the error budget is being consumed faster than the SLO allows. Alert thresholds: warning at 2x, critical at 10x burn rate.
panels.title: Error Budget Burn Rate

panels.description: Error rate as a percentage of total operations. Alert thresholds: warning at 1%, critical at 5% error rate. Sustained error rates above these thresholds trigger PagerDuty and Slack alerts.
panels.title: Error Rate with Alert Thresholds

panels.description: Performance degradation monitoring. Shows p99 latency with alert thresholds. Warning fires when p99 exceeds 300ms for 5 minutes. Critical fires when p99 exceeds 500ms for 2 minutes.
panels.title: Performance Degradation Monitor

panels.description: Node distribution across the supply chain by node type. Pie chart showing the current breakdown of supply chain actor types (producer, collector, processor, trader, importer, certifier, warehouse, port).
panels.title: Node Type Distribution

panels.description: Top gap types by total count. Shows which compliance gap categories are most frequently detected, helping prioritize remediation efforts.
panels.title: Top Gap Types (All Time)

panels.description: Graph query duration heatmap showing request density distribution across latency buckets (metric 11: gl_eudr_scm_graph_query_duration_seconds). The 500ms SLO boundary is highlighted.
panels.title: Graph Query Duration Heatmap

title: EUDR Supply Chain Mapper
